companyUrl.title: Company URL or Slug
companyUrl.description: Enter the LinkedIn company URL (e.g., https://www.linkedin.com/company/microsoft/) or just the slug (e.g., accenture).

li_at.title: LinkedIn li_at Cookie
li_at.description: Your LinkedIn 'li_at' session cookie. This is required to access the People tab.

maxWaitMs.title: Max Wait Time (ms)
maxWaitMs.description: Maximum time to wait for the page to load.
